[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111 5
1 1010100 3
2 0001101 3
3 1011001 4
4 1000010 2
5 0000000 a
6 0110001 3
7 1111000 4

01 10 1111001 5
12 21 1111011 6
23 32 0011111 5 match 0
34 43 1011111 6
45 54 1011101 5
56 65 1011101 5
67 76 1011011 5
70 07 1110011 5

02 20 0110011 4
13 31 1111111 a
24 42 1010111 5
35 53 0011111 5 match 0
46 64 1011101 5
57 75 1001111 5
60 06 1111001 5
71 17 1111010 5

03 30 0111111 6
14 41 1111100 5
25 52 0001111 4
36 63 1011111 6
47 74 1010110 4
50 05 0111101 5
61 16 1111001 5
72 27 1000011 3

04 40 1110101 5
15 51 1111101 6
26 62 1011011 5
37 73 1011111 6
